article_title: DuckDB 1.5.0 Ships VARIANT Type, Built-In Geometry, and Overhauled CLI in Largest Release Since 1.0

content_preview.title: DuckDB 1.5.0 Ships VARIANT Type, Built-In Geometry, and Overhauled CLI in Largest Release Since 1.0
content_preview.summary: DuckDB 1.5.0 introduces a VARIANT type that speeds JSON queries up to 100x, promotes GEOMETRY into core, overhauls the CLI, and delivers broad performance gains across more than 6,500 commits from nearly 100 contributors.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

DuckDB Labs released version 1.5.0 of its embeddable analytical database on March 9, 2026, codenamed "Variegata" after the paradise shelduck endemic to New Zealand. The release introduces three headline features -- a native [VARIANT data type](https://duckdb.org/2026/03/09/announcing-duckdb-150), a [built-in GEOMETRY type](https://duckdb.org/2026/03/09/announcing-duckdb-150), and a [redesigned command line client](https://duckdb.org/2026/03/09/announcing-duckdb-150) -- alongside bro...

recommendations: Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt

editor_notes.content_quality: Comprehensive database release coverage with VARIANT type, GEOMETRY, CLI, and performance details.
editor_notes.source_verification: DuckDB official blog: verified — March 9 release, VARIANT type, GEOMETRY core promotion, CLI overhaul, 6500+ commits, ~100 contributors, 17% TPC-H throughput, DuckDB 2.0 September 2026 confirmed. GitHub releases and MotherDuck blog provide additional technical detail.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All features and metrics verified against official announcement.
editor_notes.originality: Fresh topic — no prior DuckDB 1.5 coverage.
